reconciliation.horizontal: The independently randomized initial blind protocol passed by a two-to-one majority, and both complete iris-plus-highlight assemblies have positive rendered screen-X deltas.
reconciliation.vertical: The initial blind protocol passed by a two-to-one majority, and both iris assemblies plus the complete head control have the required negative rendered screen-Y deltas.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: unchanged after replacing pupil-only leaves with complete iris assemblies
